faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Lyndhurst home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool clothing or carpets, silky tubes or cases in fabric folds, adult moths flying near closets or storage areas, and webbing on fabric surfaces. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on affected items. If you spot any of these signs in your Lyndhurst property, contact us immediately for an inspection.

After our thorough inspection of your Lyndhurst home or business, we'll provide a detailed estimate tailored to your specific situation.

faqs.question: What methods do you use to eliminate clothes moths?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive approach includes thorough inspection to identify all affected areas, targeted insecticide treatments for larvae and adults, pheromone traps for monitoring, heat treatment options for severe infestations, and detailed recommendations for cleaning and preventing future problems. We also provide guidance on proper storage techniques and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.
